pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh which explicitly injects 'Julian Bautista' and 'Chloe Arnaud' as uncredentialed users.
Verified from seed_ac_data.py which seeds these users with valid RFID cards, serving as control users who must not be modified.
Verified from the task description which specifies assigning the temporary PIN '774411' to uncredentialed users.
Verified from the task description which explicitly instructs to append ' [TEMP]' to the Last Name.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated user data dynamically injected via setup scripts. The target users requiring credential remediation are Julian (Bautista) and Chloe (Arnaud), as they are explicitly injected without credentials in setup_task.sh. Control users (Priya, Derek, Marcus, Fatima) are seeded with valid RFID cards in seed_ac_data.py and should not be modified. The expected PIN to assign is '774411' and the last name suffix to append is '[TEMP]', as stated in the task instructions.
